name: William Shakespeare
abstract: William Shakespeare (c. 23 April 1564 – 23 April 1616) was an English playwright, poet and actor.

about_quotes.speaker: Delfeayo Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: I think Duke – it was very cleverly done. Duke was – I’m sure he observed the Shakespeare plays at the Stratford Festival.

about_quotes.evidence: this was not my first brush with Shakespeare, because I had recorded 'A Lover And His Lass' earlier in my career.
